priority_flags: ⚑ Displaced Student — May Need Housing/Social Support

agent3.summary: This student has not yet started their academic journey and has not yet achieved any grades.

interventions.action: Encourage the student to meet with an academic advisor to discuss course selection and academic planning.
Provide the student with resources on academic support services, such as tutoring and writing centers.
Connect the student with a peer mentor or student success coach for guidance and support.

agent3.message_to_student: We're here to support you on your academic journey! Let's work together to create a plan that helps you succeed.
